mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user_address WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY is_default DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_address(user_id, receiver, phone, detail, is_default) VALUES(#{userId}, #{receiver}, #{phone}, #{detail}, #{isDefault})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_address WHERE address_id = #{addressId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE user_address SET is_default = 0 WHERE user_id = #{userId}
